name: acgme-case-submitter
description: Chrome extension to auto-fill ACGME case entry forms
author: Razvan Azamfirei

scripts.package:zip: VERSION=$(bun -e "const p = await Bun.file('package.json').json(); console.log(p.version);") && bun run clean && bun run build && cd dist && rm -f ../acgme-case-submitter-v$VERSION.zip && zip -r ../acgme-case-submitter-v$VERSION.zip . -x '*.DS_Store' -x '.vite/*' -x '.vite/**'
scripts.release:prepare: bun run check && bun run package:zip
scripts.release:tag: VERSION=$(bun -e "const p = await Bun.file('package.json').json(); console.log(p.version);") && if [ "${SIGN_TAGS:-$(git config --get user.signingkey 2>/dev/null && echo 1)}" ]; then git tag -s -a v$VERSION -m "Release v$VERSION"; else git tag -a v$VERSION -m "Release v$VERSION"; fi && git push origin v$VERSION
scripts.release:publish: bun run release:prepare && bun run release:tag
